stemHtml: If there are three aircraft in your Traffic Advisory (TA) area, can a TCAS generate an RA for all three aircraft simultaneously?

options.a: A TCAS cannot issue RAs, it only provides Traffic Advisories (TAs).
options.b: The number of aircraft in the TA area doesn't affect the issuance of RAs.
options.c: Yes,  TCAS can issue an RA for all three aircraft simultaneously based on the closest threat.
options.d: No, a TCAS can only issue an RA for the closest aircraft that poses the greatest threat.
